description: A screenshot grabbed from a live Senate floor broadcast (C-SPAN style). The wide shot shows the U.S. Senate chamber with its blue carpet patterned with stars, marble rostrum, blue draperies, and an American flag; the presiding officer sits at the elevated dais and a handful of senators and clerks are scattered at desks on the floor. The only graphic element is the standard broadcast lower-third overlay: a blue bar showing the live tally 'Yea 51  Nay 44', the gold circular United States Senate seal, and the caption 'Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be a Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System'. Because the overlay is the network's own broadcast chyron rather than an agency-designed graphic, and the bulk of the image is a candid live video frame, this is classified as not a designed meme/poster. The intent is to document/announce the confirmation vote referenced in the tweet. On-image text: 'Yea 51 Nay 44'; 'Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be a Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System'; 'United States Senate'.
notable_text: Yea 51 Nay 44; Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be a Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
